name: long tunnel. I hear buzzing ahead
description: I'm in a long tunnel. I hear buzzing ahead
hints: The buzzing ahead warns of bees in the next room. Make sure you are prepared before going north.
Bring mud from the swamp before heading NORTH to deal with the bees guarding the Royal Honey.
Go NORTH to reach the bee room (room 8) with mud in hand. Go SOUTH to return to the large cavern.
notes: Tunnel connecting the large cavern (S/room 7) to the bee room (N/room 8). The buzzing is a warning about the African bees ahead. Bring mud before proceeding north.
